title: Fix terminal 502 and prevent stuck restarts

log.context: Fix terminal 502 and prevent stuck restarts

All done. Here's what was fixed:

**Immediate fix:** The terminal server process was already running (had auto-restarted on its own — restart counter was at 2), so a force-kill wasn't needed. The service came up clean and is responding HTTP 302 on port 7682.

**Permanent fix:** Updated `/home/clungus/.config/systemd/user/terminal-server.service` with two new directives:
- `KillMode=mixed` — sends SIGTERM to the main process but SIGKILL to all remaining processes in the cgroup after the timeout, ...(truncated)
